```{r}
pop_values_clean <- pop_values[!is.na(pop_values) & pop_values > 0]

# Estimate densities
pop_density <- density(pop_values_clean, from = 0, to = 5500, n = 512)
sub_density <- density(sub_values_clean, from = 0, to = 5500, n = 512)

# Find peak x-value (mode) for each curve
pop_peak_x <- pop_density$x[which.max(pop_density$y)]
sub_peak_x <- sub_density$x[which.max(sub_density$y)]

# Compute offset directly from peaks
peak_offset <- sub_peak_x - pop_peak_x

# Report results
cat("Peak (mode) of population density:", pop_peak_x, "\n")
cat("Peak (mode) of subset density:", sub_peak_x, "\n")
cat("Offset between peaks:", peak_offset, "units\n")
```

Cross correlation method, non-parametric, robust 
```{r}
# Estimate KDEs for both datasets over the same fixed grid
x_grid <- seq(0, 5500, length.out = 512)

# Kernel density estimates
pop_density <- density(Ndep_df$NDep_NoOcean2, from = 0, to = 5500, n = length(x_grid))
sub_density <- density(sub_values_clean, from = 0, to = 5500, n = length(x_grid))

# Perform cross-correlation on the y-values of the densities
ccf_result <- ccf(pop_density$y, sub_density$y, plot = TRUE)

# Calculate the offset in original units (phosphorus units)
dx <- diff(x_grid[1:2])
offset_index <- ccf_result$lag[which.max(ccf_result$acf)]
offset_value <- offset_index * dx

cat("Estimated offset (cross-correlation):", offset_value, "units\n")
```











##NPP
```{r}
NPP <- raster(here(rast_loc,'NPP_Reproject_10x.tif'))

# plot raster data
plot(NPP,
     main = "NPP")
```

Convert raster values to data frame
```{r}
NPP <- brick(here(rast_loc,'NPP_Reproject_10x.tif'))
```

```{r}
NPP_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(NPP,spatial = TRUE))
head(NPP_df)
hist(NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x)
```


```{r}
# --- 1. Calculate modes (peak positions) for each group ---
# Remove NAs if needed
mode_tropics <- density(na.omit(NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x))$x[which.max(density(na.omit(NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x))$y)]
mode_bnf     <- density(na.omit(bnf$NPP_MODIS_EX))$x[which.max(density(na.omit(bnf$NPP_MODIS_EX))$y)]
mode_denit   <- density(na.omit(denit$Extracted_NPP_MODIS))$x[which.max(density(na.omit(denit$Extracted_NPP_MODIS))$y)]

# --- 2. Set axis limits and color palette ---
x_axis_extent <- c(0, 2.5)

color_palette <- c(
  "NPP - Tropics" = "grey",
  "NPP - Fixation points" = "red",
  "NPP - Denitrification points" = "blue"
)

# --- 3. Create the plot with density curves and vertical dashed lines ---
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = NPP_df, aes(x = NPP_Reproject_10x, fill = "NPP - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = bnf, aes(x = NPP_MODIS_EX, fill = "NPP - Fixation points"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = denit, aes(x = Extracted_NPP_MODIS, fill = "NPP - Denitrification points"), alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # Add vertical dashed lines at density peaks (modes)
  geom_vline(xintercept = mode_tropics, linetype = "dashed", color = color_palette["NPP - Tropics"], linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mode_bnf,     linetype = "dashed", color = color_palette["NPP - Fixation points"], linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mode_denit,   linetype = "dashed", color = color_palette["NPP - Denitrification points"], linewidth = 0.75) +

  # Labels, theme, and scale adjustments
  labs(title = " ", x = "NPP (g C m−2 yr−1)", y = " ") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.89),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

# Show plot
p
ggsave(here(figure_loc, "NPP_10x_Density.png"), plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
cat("Mode of NPP - Tropics: ", round(mode_tropics, 2), "g C m−2 yr−1\n")
cat("Mode of NPP - Fixation points: ", round(mode_bnf, 2), "g C m−2 yr−1\n")
cat("Mode of NPP - Denitrification points: ", round(mode_denit, 2), "g C m−2 yr−1\n")
```




##Density curve offset 
BNF - Differences in curve modes -> peak vlaues and offset 
```{r}
sub_values <- bnf$NPP_MODIS_EX
sub_values_clean <- sub_values[!is.na(sub_values) & sub_values > 0]

pop_values <- NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x
pop_values_clean <- pop_values[!is.na(pop_values) & pop_values > 0]

# Estimate densities
pop_density <- density(pop_values_clean, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = 512)
sub_density <- density(sub_values_clean, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = 512)

# Find peak x-value (mode) for each curve
pop_peak_x <- pop_density$x[which.max(pop_density$y)]
sub_peak_x <- sub_density$x[which.max(sub_density$y)]

# Compute offset directly from peaks
peak_offset <- sub_peak_x - pop_peak_x

# Report results
cat("Peak (mode) of population density:", pop_peak_x, "\n")
cat("Peak (mode) of subset density:", sub_peak_x, "\n")
cat("Offset between peaks:", peak_offset, "units \n")
```


Cross correlation method, non-parametric, robust 
```{r}
# Estimate KDEs for both datasets over the same fixed grid
x_grid <- seq(0, 2.5, length.out = 512)


# Kernel density estimates
pop_density <- density(NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = length(x_grid))
sub_density <- density(sub_values_clean, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = length(x_grid))

# Perform cross-correlation on the y-values of the densities
ccf_result <- ccf(pop_density$y, sub_density$y, plot = TRUE)

# Calculate the offset in original units (phosphorus units)
dx <- diff(x_grid[1:2])
offset_index <- ccf_result$lag[which.max(ccf_result$acf)]
offset_value <- offset_index * dx

cat("Estimated offset (cross-correlation):", offset_value, "units\n")
```

Negative offset means the second whole curve is offset to the left, positive is to the right 




Denit: Differences in curve modes -> peak vlaues and offset 
```{r}
sub_values <- denit$Extracted_NPP_MODIS
sub_values_clean <- sub_values[!is.na(sub_values) & sub_values > 0]

pop_values <- NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x
pop_values_clean <- pop_values[!is.na(pop_values) & pop_values > 0]

# Estimate densities
pop_density <- density(pop_values_clean, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = 512)
sub_density <- density(sub_values_clean, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = 512)

# Find peak x-value (mode) for each curve
pop_peak_x <- pop_density$x[which.max(pop_density$y)]
sub_peak_x <- sub_density$x[which.max(sub_density$y)]

# Compute offset directly from peaks
peak_offset <- sub_peak_x - pop_peak_x

# Report results
cat("Peak (mode) of population density:", pop_peak_x, "\n")
cat("Peak (mode) of subset density:", sub_peak_x, "\n")
cat("Offset between peaks:", peak_offset, "units\n")
```

Cross correlation method, non-parametric, robust 
```{r}
# Estimate KDEs for both datasets over the same fixed grid
x_grid <- seq(0, 2.5, length.out = 512)

# Kernel density estimates
pop_density <- density(NPP_df$NPP_Reproject_10x, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = length(x_grid))
sub_density <- density(sub_values_clean, from = 0, to = 2.5, n = length(x_grid))

# Perform cross-correlation on the y-values of the densities
ccf_result <- ccf(pop_density$y, sub_density$y, plot = TRUE)

# Calculate the offset in original units (phosphorus units)
dx <- diff(x_grid[1:2])
offset_index <- ccf_result$lag[which.max(ccf_result$acf)]
offset_value <- offset_index * dx

cat("Estimated offset (cross-correlation):", offset_value, "units\n")
```




##NPP - thresholding 

```{r}
bnf %>%
  summarise(
    count_above_cutoff = sum(NPP_MODIS_EX > 1.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_count = n(),
    proportion_above_cutoff = count_above_cutoff / total_count
  )
```


```{r}
denit %>%
  summarise(
    count_above_cutoff = sum(Extracted_NPP_MODIS > 1.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_count = n(),
    proportion_above_cutoff = count_above_cutoff / total_count
  )
```
 

Area above raster cutoff: 
```{r}
NPP <- rast(here(rast_loc,'NPP_Reproject_10x.tif'))
# Create a binary raster where cells > 10 are TRUE (1), others are FALSE (0)
above_cutoff <- NPP > 1.25

# Convert TRUE/FALSE to numeric
above_cutoff <- classify(above_cutoff, cbind(NA, NA, NA), include.lowest = TRUE)  # keep NAs as NA
above_cutoff <- as.numeric(above_cutoff)

# Calculate cell area (in km² or m², depending on CRS)
cell_areas <- cellSize(NPP, unit = "m")  # or unit = "m" for m²

# Multiply by mask
above_area_raster <- cell_areas * above_cutoff

# Sum area above cutoff
area_above_cutoff <- global(above_area_raster, sum, na.rm = TRUE)[1,1]
```

Total area: 
```{r}
# Only count area where data exists
total_area <- global(cell_areas * !is.na(NPP), sum, na.rm = TRUE)[1,1]
```

Proportion of area above cuttoff:
```{r}
proportion_above_cutoff <- area_above_cutoff / total_area
proportion_above_cutoff
```
